question: What scandal emerged in Brazil in February 2021 regarding COVID-19 vaccinations for elderly citizens?
ground_truth: Elderly people in Petrópolis and Niterói, Rio de Janeiro, were injected with empty syringes instead of the COVID-19 vaccine, as shown in videos broadcast by Telemundo.
event_desc: Three videos broadcast by Telemundo, show elderly people in Petrópolis and Niterói, Rio de Janeiro, being injected by empty syringes rather than with the COVID-19 vaccine.
